transcript.text:
[Should I just get all of them?]
[Shocked]
[She's just making an order]
[Taking the order...]
[Not done yet]
[That's all]
[Wait a min...]
[Bunsik restaurant]
[About this much?]
[Knowing how good these are is the scariest part...]
[Disappeared]
[You're something else...]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Namhyeon-dong today
There's a bunsik (street food-diner) that's been here for about 20 years
I'm here because I heard that the owner puts extra time and effort into the food

So it's not just your average bunsik restaurant
There might be a wait right now
Thankfully there's no wait
[Byeol Mi Bunsik] [Seoul, Gwanak-gu]
Hello~!
-I'm a huge fan of yours -Really?
I've been wanting to serve you food
And I'm shocked because you actually showed up
I heard the food here is good My restaurant is nearby
Jungwon Bunsik!
We don't have customers because of this place (Jokes)
[Let's sit down]
There are a lot of items on the menu
[Not good for indecisive people]
[Brisket Ramyun Noodles highly recommended!]
[Cool Peace (peach drink)]

Do you have a "best item"?
Oh, I see the stars
These are the popular items?
Those are the ones I recommend
And they are tasty
Should I just get all of them then?
[5 stars]
[3 stars]
"You will regret it if you don't try it"
[Please eat this]
I'm pushing that item right now
People don't like ordering brisket at bunsik restaurants
It's good and I want the customers to try it
That's why I put that up
And that's all they order now
Shrimp tempura kimbap, imitation crab meat kimbap, tuna kimchi flying fish roe rice ball,

brisket ramyun, kimchi nabe donkatsu,
brisket soybean stew, brisket tteokboki,
It's a brisket party today
1 donkatsu udon as well,
[Low storage...]
[Still ordering...]
[8 dishes]
Should I get 1 more?
Oh, you have rice cake skewers too? I'll take that too
The salad donkatsu is a popular item as well,
but I don't like vegetables
But you're so skinny
1 regular donkatsu as well, please
[Let's try all the popular items]
[Imitation crab meat on regular kimbap ingredients]
[Colorful crab meat kimbap]

[A meaty piece of shrimp tempura inside now]
[Flavorful shrimp tempura kimbap]
[Kimchi nabe donkatsu (pork cutlet)]
[A perfect combination of kimchi nabe and donkatsu]
[Perfect combo #2: udon and donkatsu]
[Here comes the highlight]
[Those thinly-cut briskets]
[With green onions and enoki mushrooms]
[Rice cake skewers with sweet sauce]
Thank you
[It just keeps coming out...]
This looks like jjamppong and not ramyun
[It's all here!]
The portions are huge
Bon appetit
It looks delicious Lots of portions

Kimchi donkatsu,
Soybean stew,
Rice ball, tteokboki,
Really big rice cake skewers,
Donkatsu The sauce is right here
[Let's put some on]
Really big pieces of shrimp in kimbap too
Imitation crab meat kimbap here
Let's eat the brisket ramyun noodles first
It looks like Shin ramyun
Lots of briskets inside
Looks delicious
This doesn't taste like ramyun soup
That's nice
Really flavorful
This is not ramyun It's a premium ramyun

Smokey flavors
Brisket and ramyun noodles
No more noodles though I ate everything
The soup
It's almost finished
No more
[Brisket ramyun out]
Let's try the tteokboki now (spicy rice cake)
The brisket tastes really good
The pieces are pretty thick too
And tasty
I love the consistency of it because it has some thickness to the meat
-Is the rice cake made with rice? -Yes they are
I love it
No wonder it's so good
I love the chewiness of the rice-made rice cakes

Wrap it with fishcake and brisket
The rice ball should taste good with tteokboki sauce
Amazing
This should be good by itself too
Lots of tuna and flying fish roe inside
Fish roe, kimchi, and tuna go so well together
Let's try the soybean stew
It's highly recommended
Where's the rice?
This needs to be eaten with rice
Lots of mushrooms inside
I love soybean stews with mushrooms
I wish this place was near my house It's perfect for a meal
Would you like to move?
I'm kidding
This place seems like Kimbap Heaven, right? With a similar list of food items that are served

But the quality is different
I can taste the quality of all the dishes here
Kimbap
The imitation crab meat one is popular
That's good
It's packed with ingredients
[Straight into donkatsu udon]
It tastes like what I expected
Why couldn't I think of this idea?
Regular donkatsu too
This can't possibly go wrong
Shrimp tempura kimbap
The whole tempura inside
This tastes really good
I've only had this at convenience stores
This is at another level

It's savory and has some sauce that gives it a clean taste
Not sure what it is
That's really good
[Is someone coming after you...?]
I ate too fast
I'm stuffed
Okay, I'm good now
Rice cake skewers
Look how big this is
It's been a long time I had these in high school
This is it
Sweet and sour
I had a lot of these and the pikachu donkatsu when I was younger
Let's try this one now
It's been a while since I had this too and it's so good
There's a lot of meat inside

It's like spicy stir-fried pork
1, 2, 3
I have 3 donkatsu dishes here
The brisket in the tteokboki is really yummy
Forreal
[In the tteokboki sauce]
I love how chunky the imitation crab meat is
These are better than the regular imitation crab sticks
The rest of the nabe should be good too
It's like stir-fried pork
[Let's continue eating]
The imitation crab meat...
Oh no!
The sides exploded
I personally like the shrimp tempura one more
The crab meat one is good as you eat, but the shrimp one is good right away

Wow, a true YouTube mukbang representative
No way
South Korea's best mukbang YouTuber
Stop please
The brisket tastes expensive
It's okay because people order that and other dishes too
It's wagyu brisket
PD: How about we get brisket tteokboki at Jungwon Bunsik?
Should we?
You can go ahead and do it
[New item coming soon...?]
[Let's switch this]
Mix it with some rice
[Brisket soybean stew and white rice]
[2 pieces of donkatsu at a time!]
It feels like nabe when you eat donkatsu followed up with some soup

I'm eating better here than at my own restaurant
Eating at my own restaurant was good at first,
but I can't now after eating there for a month straight
Rice cake skewers
[Going away very fast...]
[Cleared]
[Donkatsu udon cleared!]
Let's dip the kimbap in ramyun soup too
I was eating in whatever order, but the food portions are balanced out
1 rice cake per brisket
[Brisket!]
[On top of kimbap]
You're almost finished with the food
[Where did all the food go?]
-The brisket tastes great -Thank you
No, thank you!

So much brisket
[10 items cleared]
That was such a great meal
I didn't rest at all
That's incredible
Big stomach (a play on words)
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
